description:
🕒 10:30–15:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ohk-hannoalps3/

This tour has been closed to new registrations due to organizer circumstances.

This tour traverses the spine of the Hanno Alps—the mountain range running from Izugadake to Tenranzan—over 4 separate outings. Part 3 covers the section from Agano Station, running over the signature peaks of the Hanno Alps: Maeita, Odaka, and Tengaku mountains. Lunch will be a special bento from Taira Kuri-en (local orchard).

【Fee】
7,800 yen per person (guide fee, lunch, insurance)

【Capacity】
10 people

【Guide】
Akira Shimizu – certified mountain guide, Japan Alpine Guides Association, Stage II

【What to bring】
Gloves, drinking water, hat, rain gear, snacks, towel
location: 集合 西武池袋線・秩父線「吾野駅」駅前広場
summary: Mountain guide tour: Hanno Alps full traverse part 3 (Agano Station to Maeita, Odaka, and Tengaku mountains to Higashi-Agano Station)
